files.content:
"use client"

import { ParcatsChart } from "@/components/ui/charts/statistical/parcats-chart"

// Customer segmentation data
const customerData = [
  { id: "1", categories: { Segment: "Premium", Channel: "Online", Outcome: "Retained" } },
  { id: "2", categories: { Segment: "Premium", Channel: "Store", Outcome: "Retained" } },
  { id: "3", categories: { Segment: "Standard", Channel: "Online", Outcome: "Churned" } },
  { id: "4", categories: { Segment: "Standard", Channel: "Store", Outcome: "Retained" } },
  { id: "5", categories: { Segment: "Budget", Channel: "Online", Outcome: "Churned" } },
  { id: "6", categories: { Segment: "Premium", Channel: "Online", Outcome: "Retained" } },
  { id: "7", categories: { Segment: "Budget", Channel: "Store", Outcome: "Retained" } },
  { id: "8", categories: { Segment: "Standard", Channel: "Online", Outcome: "Retained" } },
  { id: "9", categories: { Segment: "Premium", Channel: "Store", Outcome: "Churned" } },
  { id: "10", categories: { Segment: "Budget", Channel: "Online", Outcome: "Churned" } },
]

const dimensions = ["Segment", "Channel", "Outcome"]

export default function ParcatsChartRibbon() {
  return (
    <ParcatsChart
      data={customerData}
      dimensions={dimensions}
      variant="ribbon"
      showCounts
      color="#8b5cf6"
    />
  )
}
